name: microtik-setup
description: HikCentral Remote Site Setup — Electron desktop app for configuring MikroTik LTE routers over SSH (WireGuard to AWS EC2 / HikCentral).

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && vite build
scripts.electron:dev: vite-plugin-electron will run this automatically via `npm run dev`
